tools_additions.tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 View Repair Batch
tools_additions.trigger_conditions: Use only for read-only WBS09 filter/sort repair planning after panel-readback reports saved Airtable view gaps. Do not use for mutation.
tools_additions.input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT and DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR. Supports Mode DryRun, a target list file or AllGapTargets, the WBS09 manifest, and browser/user profile parameters. Apply mode is disabled after failed 2026-05-15 validation.
tools_additions.output_contract: Writes view_repair_batch_rollup.json, view_repair_batch_plan.json, per-target reports, logs, optional screenshots/DOM evidence, and a ChatGPT-friendly ZIP when run through a staging runner.
tools_additions.safety_preconditions: DryRun is read-only. Apply mode is hard-blocked in both PowerShell and Node because v1 broad mutation failed validation. Any future mutation path must be a separate v2 operation-class-specific apply tool with pre-discovered controls and explicit approval.

failed_apply_run.result: 0 verified repairs; 25 gaps remained after post-failed-apply readback
failed_apply_run.primary_failure_signature: Could not find sort direction control
